blend_inner_t7.interpretation: Sys2 vs Sys1-only inner-zone clearance difference; >0 confirms dual-process layer earns its keep. The GATE criterion is mean > 0 (NOT every individual replicate); negative replicates within the ensemble are expected and reported honestly.

hayano_tension.note: CMC=0.25 produces hayano_t4~0.45; raw Hayano 2013 target 1.008 is outside physical range [0,1]; gap=0.56; documented as model boundary condition not calibration failure (1.008 is outside physical range).

calibration_basis.cmc: Hayano 2013 inner-zone clearing rate (physical anchor, not optimized)
calibration_basis.alpha_beta_kappa: Joint moment matching on mid_ps2_dip and mid_ps2_trough with CMC fixed; process targets are model-internal, derived from three-phase theoretical prediction (main.tex Section 6.2)
